fullText: so my name is Stefan euripidu um and I'm a solution architect in Vodafone [Music] in terms of success I would say we've seen a lot of reduction in technical debt uh Shadow I.T as well we've seen improvements of code quality we've enabled teams to start thinking about um you know what is the standard that they need to try and get their quality to to meet the feature in the 90 x series that we find most impactful is the token lifecycle management uh feature it allows us to ensure that the Integrations we create from sonar Cube to other services are meeting Vodafone security policies in terms of token lifecycle management how long those tokens live for how often they are refreshed and what scope they're made available for useful
